report.stats: ⚔️ DMG {dmg} (lines changed) | 💀 Kills {kills} | 💥 Hits {hits} | 🔥 Max combo ×{maxCombo}
sage.rest: 💡 Sage: 🛌 your HP is nearly spent — rest, the window restores it.
sage.potion: 💡 Sage: mana runs low — a potion (/compact) or strike camp (/clear).
sage.pacing: 💡 Sage: half your HP gone, the boss barely scratched — slow your pace, sharpen each strike.
